numerical.label: Authoritative
numerical.definition: Sources are almost entirely primary, official, or highly reputable for this topic.

numerical.label: Excellent
numerical.definition: Strong, credible sources throughout; at most a trivially weaker entry.

numerical.label: Very trustworthy
numerical.definition: Mostly credible sources with one clearly weaker entry.

numerical.label: Trustworthy
numerical.definition: Generally credible, but a couple of lower-quality or secondary sources.

numerical.label: Above mixed
numerical.definition: More credible than not, but noticeable reliance on secondary sources.

numerical.label: Mixed
numerical.definition: A roughly even mix of credible and questionable sources.

numerical.label: Below mixed
numerical.definition: Mostly secondary or low-quality sources, with a few credible ones.

numerical.label: Weak
numerical.definition: Mostly low-quality, SEO-bait, or unverified sources.

numerical.label: Untrustworthy
numerical.definition: Sources are spam, content farms, or have no credibility.
